title: Textron Inc. (TXT) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for Textron Inc. (TXT), reflecting cash flow generation from its aerospace and defense lines and assessing intrinsic value.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 5.0% over next 10 years, aligning with general defense budget growth.
